catinfo.description: A robust, multi-platform news and information application delivering real-time updates, built with scalability and performance in mind. Features offline capabilities, personalized content feeds, and seamless cross-device synchronization.
catinfo.liveDemoError: Could not start the emulator. Check that the API and backend worker are running.
catinfo.liveDemoConflict: The emulator is already starting. Wait a minute and try Live demo again.
catinfo.liveDemoUnauthorized: Backend authorization failed. Ensure WORKER_INTERNAL_TOKEN matches BACKEND_INTERNAL_TOKEN.
catinfo.liveDemoBootTimeout: The Android emulator did not finish booting on the server in time. Check Docker (android-emulator container) and backend logs.
catinfo.liveDemoGatewayTimeout: The API stopped waiting, but the emulator may still be starting on the server. Wait and try Live demo once more.
catinfo.liveDemoHint: Live demo connects to the backend Android emulator and streams the 3catinfo app inside the phone frame.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Straight answers before you reach out. Need more detail? The form below is built for that.

q.projectTypes: What kinds of projects do you take on?
q.cost: How much can a project cost?
q.maintenance: Do you offer maintenance or improvements after delivery?
q.remote: Do you work with remote clients?

a.projectTypes: Websites, apps, and custom solutions—from landings and corporate sites to fuller platforms with backend, admin panels, and automations.
a.cost: It depends on scope, complexity, and your specific needs. After reviewing your idea, I’ll share a clear proposal with timelines, cost, and what’s included.
a.timeline: It varies by type of work. A landing can be ready quickly; a larger platform or app needs more planning and time.
a.maintenance: Yes—support, improvements, performance work, new features, and ongoing maintenance after launch.
a.remote: Yes. I work remotely with clear communication and steady project follow-up.
